---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new user workflow or product capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed workflow

Describe the ideal Klava behavior from the user's point of view.

## Why Klava should own this

Why does this belong in Klava rather than in a different tool?

## Safety / approval impact

Does this touch secrets, privileged actions, or approval flows?

## Success criteria

What would make this feature clearly done?
